message:
test(decision): add property tests for goal-plan and goal-progress invariants (process_triage-aii.22)

10 proptest properties (2000 cases each) covering optimize_goal_plan
(empty/protected/max-actions/risk-budget/fraction/achievable/variants)
and measure_progress (discrepancy formula/tolerance/never-panics).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
